5 corporate goons sent down by a subsidiary of The Corporation to analyze the planet hands-on. The Subdirector of the subsidiary might be interested in mountains of paperwork, assessing whether it's worthwhile to send a freighter to this planet.
Corporate goons sent down by The Corporation to analyze the planet hands-on.

- Choose 5 colonists (out of 10) - Every colonist starts with a Full-Time Employee title with The Corporation. - You are Allied with The Corporation by default. - You are Enemies with The Cyberpunks by default. - Start with some basic supplies. - Random junk like steel and wood is scattered around the map.
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.WinConditions.Pape: Fill out a certain amount of paperwork, and sell it to The Corporation across your entire playthrough. You win when the total amount of completed paperwork sold to The Corporation equals or exceeds the goal.
LanguageData.Playwright.Components.WinConditions.Corp: Have a certain number of colonists with the chosen Corporate title. Temporary colonists (from quests or otherwise) are not counted. You win when the amount of permanent colonists with the specified title equals or exceeds the goal.
